CVE-2021-4235.title: Due to unbounded alias chasing, a maliciously crafted YAML file c ...
CVE-2021-4235.summary: Due to unbounded alias chasing, a maliciously crafted YAML file can cause the system to consume significant system resources. If parsing user input, this may be used as a denial of service vector.

CVE-2022-3064.title: Parsing malicious or large YAML documents can consume excessive a ...
CVE-2022-3064.summary: Parsing malicious or large YAML documents can consume excessive amounts of CPU or memory.
